title: Infrastructure Engineer I
description: Datadog is hiring an Infrastructure Engineer I to help build and maintain the resilient infrastructure that powers our cloud monitoring platform. You'll own pieces of our production environment, learn from experienced engineers, and develop expertise in cloud operations, infrastructure automation, and system reliability.
responsibilities: Deploy, configure, and maintain Kubernetes clusters across multiple cloud providers
Write Terraform and Ansible code to automate infrastructure provisioning
Troubleshoot infrastructure issues and implement preventive monitoring
Participate in on-call rotation and respond to production incidents
Document infrastructure decisions and maintain runbooks
Collaborate with platform teams to ensure scalability and reliability

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

benefits: Health, dental, vision, and life insurance
Unlimited PTO and flexible work schedule
Professional development budget and conference attendance
